content: الرَّاجِل دَه رَغَاي مِش بِيِبَطَّل دَردَشَة
translations: eng:this guy is a chatterbox, he won't stop chattering

transcriptions.arabizi: ilraagil dah raghaei mish biyibattal dardasha
